name: industrial-design-team
description: Claude Code plugin for industrial design / hardware product development. Six agents (research, concept, CAD-spec, DFM-reviewer, materials, orchestrator) plus five skills covering concept briefs, parametric CAD specifications, design-for-manufacturing audits, material/finish selection, and tolerance-stack analysis. Deliverables are versioned Markdown documents — specifications and reviews, not CAD files. Designed to brief and critique work done in Fusion 360 / SolidWorks / Onshape, not replace it.
